name: Power Blue Ember
description: Power Blue Ember is the scrapped Power Blue counterpart of Ember.
biography: Power Blue Ember is the scrapped Power Blue counterpart of Ember. She was planned as a special variant for the Power Blue series, a partnership between Activision and Autism Speaks. Like other Power Blue Skylanders, she would have featured a distinct blue and white color scheme. However, the variant was never officially released and remains a piece of cut content from Skylanders: Imaginators.
personality: Determined and disciplined, Ember is a master of the dual blades who treats her role as a Sensei with the utmost respect and focus.

story.content: Power Blue Ember was discovered through game files and prototype illustrations. She was intended to represent the Sentinel Class in the Power Blue lineup, as evidenced by her concept art and scrapped assets.

trivia: She is one of the few scrapped Sensei variants known to exist.
The Power Blue line was created to support autism awareness.
Her design replaces her usual red and gold armor with blue and white.
Her existence was confirmed via Artstation on December 22, 2022.
gameplay: As a Sentinel Sensei, Power Blue Ember would have utilized dual-wielding katana attacks, fire geysers, and explosive dash moves to control the battlefield. Her combat style focuses on the Sentinel battle class.

basic.name: Samurai Combo
basic.content: Swing the dual blades in a series of powerful strikes.

basic.name: Flame Geyser
basic.content: Summon a geyser of fire from the ground to burn enemies.

basic_upgrades.name: Immolation
basic_upgrades.content: Surround yourself in a cloak of fire to damage nearby enemies.

basic_upgrades.name: Inner Fire
basic_upgrades.content: Channel your energy to increase attack power and speed.

soulgems.name: Living Bomb Path
soulgems.content: Unleash a devastating path of explosive living fire bombs.

abilities.name: Living Bomb Path Upgrade
abilities.content: Enhance the power of your living fire bomb attacks.
